item.title: Gold Prices Today: February 19, 2026
item.description: Today’s gold prices see the precious metal move down from yesterday. Here are today’s gold futures prices and a quick snapshot of where gold was yeste...

item.title: Some Drivers Can Now Claim a Tax Deduction on Car Loan Interest. Here’s How It Works
item.description: The policy, signed into law in July 2025 in the One Big Beautiful Bill Act, comes with significant eligibility restrictions and conditions.

item.title: A New Car for Under $20,000? That’s So 2025
item.description: Shrinking economy options mean affordable new cars are disappearing from the U.S. market.

item.title: 9 Daily Habits of Financially Fit Older Adults
item.description: Try implementing these into your routine to help preserve your wealth.

item.title: The Real Reason Vet Bills Are Skyrocketing — and What You Can Do About It
item.description: Getting our furry friends medical attention comes at a steep cost.
